queries.question: Show press conferences and media scrums from Jack Layton.
queries.sql:
SELECT Sources.name 
FROM Sources
WHERE (Sources.event = "Press Conference" OR Sources.event = "Media Scrum") AND Sources.person = "Jack Layton"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?sources a :Sources .
  ?sources p:name ?name .
  ?sources p:event ?event_w .
  ?sources p:event ?event_w2 .
  ?sources p:person ?person_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?event_w) = "Press Conference" || STR(?event_w2) = "Media Scrum")) && STR(?person_w) = "Jack Layton"))
}

queries.question: Show press conferences and media scrums from Jack Layton.
queries.sql:
SELECT Sources.name 
FROM Sources
WHERE Sources.event = "Press Conference" OR Sources.event = "Media Scrum" AND Sources.person = "Jack Layton"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?sources a :Sources .
  ?sources p:name ?name .
  ?sources p:event ?event_w .
  ?sources p:event ?event_w2 .
  ?sources p:person ?person_w .
  FILTER((STR(?event_w) = "Press Conference" || (STR(?event_w2) = "Media Scrum" && STR(?person_w) = "Jack Layton")))
}
